phone_presence_notes: Handled a skeptical, high-maintenance customer with patience and honesty, but never used her name and warmth was inconsistent across the call.
top_strength: Handled complex long-distance inquiry with transparency — explained truck sizing, multi-day logistics, overnight storage without hesitation.
coaching_note: Differentiators pitch largely skipped in favor of jumping to flat estimate — Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee, No Worries all should precede the price.
